entry.title: Re: Specific Billing Cycles in Subscriptions
entry.content:
Thank you for very good documentation. One question a bit related to this. How would you solve this case in pricing and billing for a subscription:

Our customer would like to have one Rate Element with recurring price specified in Lookup table with a montly price per number of users (each), but they still want to have a quartly billing cycle. Price from standard Lookup table will then be assumed to be the quarterly price and not a monthly price X 3. What would be the best way of setting up this?

entry.title: Re: Which JavaScript functions are supported in Business...
entry.content:
"JavaScript expressions used to define variables, conditions and input fields in business rule actions should be based on the ECMAScript 6 standard."

Aside from ECMAScript 6 expressions we support the following commands:

  • Comparing two arrays
arrays.equals(array1, array2)
  • Comparing two arrays ignoring the order
arrays.equalsIgnoreOrder(array1, array2)

  • Getting a translated string

i18n.translate(language, key, [argument1[, argument2[, ...[, argumentN]]]])

  • Convert an Identifier to a UUID

fsm.identifierToUUID(id)

  • Convert a UUID to an Identifier

     
fsm.UUIDToIdentifier(uuid)

entry.title: Re: Hello SAP Community,Time and Cost Collection for Qual...
entry.content: Given the importance of labor time and cost tracking for quality inspections—such as incoming inspections, final control after goods receipt from production, and other inspection types—it would be helpful to understand the standard features and variants available within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for this purpose. Specifically, I’m interested in learning: What are the standard ways to collect labor time and costs associated with quality inspections, especially for activities that are not part of production sequences (routing) like incoming inspections, goods receipt inspections from production, and etc.? Are there any existing tools, apps, or configurations in the public cloud that help track costs and time spent on quality inspections in these areas, even if QM orders are not available? Is there any integration with time tracking functionalities for this purpose? Understanding the available options will help us plan how best to manage and optimize quality inspection processes and their associated costs in the cloud. Looking forward to any further insights that anybody can share. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Which JavaScript functions are supported in Business Rules (SAP Field Service Management)
entry.content: What are the exact needs you have?

entry.title: Re: Financial Accounting for Intercompany Dual Service Order Scenario in SAP S/4HANA

Do you know if this scenario works with WBS element assignment?

First service order shall be assigned to WBS element in commercial entity (1710) and Second service order  shall be assigned to WBS element in execution entity (1010). Will this work in this scenario?

entry.title: Differentiate your business by standardizing - the clean core approach ✨
entry.content: 🚀Join us for an engaging and unscripted talk titled "Differentiate Your Business by Standardizing - The Clean Core Approach," where we explore the transformative power of standardization in setting your business apart. In this candid session, our thought leaders Phil and Paul will delve into the concept of the "clean core"—a streamlined and standardized operational foundation that can drive efficiency, consistency, and innovation. This interactive talk offers a unique opportunity to gain fresh perspectives and practical insights into implementing standardized processes that empower your organization. Whether you are a business leader, manager, or aspiring entrepreneur, you will leave with actionable strategies to differentiate your business by leveraging the benefits of a clean core. Join us for a thought-provoking conversation that promises to inspire and equip you with the tools to thrive in today's competitive marketplace. You are invited to submit questions for a live Q&A with the speakers.

entry.title: Change valuation class for multiple periods/single period
entry.content:
Hi,

For my customer I need to change the valuation class for a set of materials. Something has changed since I've done this a couple of years ago.

In the material master I now see several periods that have a valuation class field that can be changed. One on every tab for current period (6), previous period (5) and last period of previous fiscal year (12/2024)

The SAP help text still states to clear all stocks for current and previous period and mark the open PO's (and STO's) with a deletion indicator before you can make any changes.

I found out that if I delete the PO items and clear the stock for this period only I can change the valuation class of period 6. Because I did not clear the stock in period 5 it still gives me the error message and shows it has stock there.

Question to you all is: If I clear the stock for period 6, change the valuation class and put back the stock, what will happen when we go to period 7? Will SAP use the valuation class of period 6 as the new valuation class for period 7?

entry.title: Re: Starting out developing skills in analytics? Not sure where to start?
entry.content:
Hi @MarkGreen,

I am planning for the SAP Data Analyst Exam as I am very much interested in SAP Analytics, I am excited to announce that I have completed 2 learning journeys, 1- Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud and 2- Designing Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud.
Now I have moved towards 3- Leveraging SAP Analytics Cloud Functionality for Enterprise Planning.
After that, I will attempt my exam after getting attempt. 
I am open to any suggestions and advices.
Thanks & regards,
Mehar Ali

entry.title: How to save/export business rules to PDF - truncates long lines
entry.content:
Hi there,

I'm trying to save a business rule to a PDF, but many of the statements are truncated when I try to print.

e.g. part of the rule looks like this:

But when I try to print / save to PDF (in landscape), it cuts off the longer statements so they can't be seen:

Does anyone know of a clever way to print/save this, without having to individually screenshot each page?

Many thanks,
Alan

entry.title: Postprocess button in confirmation
entry.content:
Dear all

Confirmation are done for operations of production orders in transaction CO12.

Now and then we see a button in the confirmation: Postprocess. When we get COGI errors normally the errors are shown in transaction COGI. However, if the button Postprocess appears the COGI errors are not shown in transaction COGI. First the user has to press 'Postprocess'' and then the COGI errors can be followed up in transaction COGI.

See attached screenprint. Can somebody please explain why this button appears? Can somebody please provide solution that the COGI errors are shown automatically in transaction COGI (without having the 'Postprocess button').

entry.title: Country field not appearing on the Address in output Forms for sales documents
entry.content:
The Country field is not appearing for the address of the standard output forms, such as Sales Order Confirmation, Delivery Note, and Invoice. 

It needs to be printed by standard on all our customer facing forms. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Country field not appearing on the Address in output...
entry.content:
As standard the country will not be displayed as part of the address in the output if the sender and receiver countries are the same. This is explained in further detailed through the following link:

 > Country Formatting

To have this field visible in these circumstances an extensibility implementation is required. Steps for extending a standard form can be found in the following link:

> How to Extend a Custom Form Template

entry.title: Re: MB5B negative opening period stock altough no materia...
entry.content: Could please tick archive material document and then execute the report

entry.title: Re: Solution to automatically update CDC schema field
entry.content:
Hello @manishekhar,
There are 2 scenarios and solutions for your query:-

1. When using the CDC Screensets (client call)
Solution: 2 ways you can try

  • Add a JavaScript code in the screenset to update the custom field value from the original value during submit, or
  • Schedule a dataflow on a frequency and copy the original-field value to custom-field.

2. When using the CDC APIs (server-side call)
Solution: In this case, you can pass the same value in the paylod to custome-field as of original-field.

Feel free to reply back for further queries. If it helped, mark thread as accepted solution.

Thanks & Regards,
Kunal Bansal, SAP CX SME
https://www.linkedin.com/in/thekunalbansal

entry.title: SAP Lumira Server Installation
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I would like to ask your help to the following:

I have installed SAP BusinessObjects 4.3 SP4 Patch 800 Hotfix 1 and I wald also to install Lumira Server.In the SAP Note https://me.sap.com/notes/3017689  I see that the compatible combination of the two products is the following:

  • BusinessObjects 4.3 SP4
  • Lumira Server 2.4 SP00 Patch 7

I am a little confused about where I must download the appropriate software for Lumira Server and what is exactly the installation path.

Must I first install Lumira server 2.4 from the Installation & Upgrade package by following the steps below?

  1. Go to the SAP Software Download Center on the SAP Support Portal at https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/softwarecenterpublished on SAP site and choose Installations and Upgrades.
  2. Under By Alphabetical Index (A-Z), click L.
  3. Under INSTALLATIONS AND UPGRADES - L, choose the required installation category: SAP LUMIRA SERVER > SAP LUMIRA SERVER 2.4

 

 

 

and after the installation of the 2.4 I must instal the Patch 7 from the

 

Installation Support Packages & Patches by following the steps bellow?

  1. Go to the SAP Software Download Center on the SAP Support Portal at https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/softwarecenter published on SAP site and choose Support Packages & Patches.
  2. Under By Alphabetical Index (A-Z), click L.
  3. Under SUPPORT PACKAGES AND PATCHES - L, choose the required installation category: SAP LUMIRA SERVER > SAP LUMIRA SERVER 2.4

 

 

Or I have the option to do only one installation by using the software “
LS4BIP_FULL00P_7-70005729.EXE” ?

 

Thank you in advance.

Evangelia

entry.title: Re: New Stock Check Behavior in Over-the-Counter Sales: D...
entry.content:
Hello,

See attached for point 2.

Also Check : 3516764 - Over-the-Counter Sales Inconsistent With the Error: Item XX: Insufficient Stock for the Product

 

To solve the issue you need to ensure that there is enough stock available for the Product or you need to remove the line Item from the Over-the-Counter Sales document.

Once enough stock if available you can perform the following steps:

  1. Go to the Over-the-Counter Sales work center.
  2. Select the Over-the-Counter Sales view.
  3. Click on the Check button.
  4. Click on the Redetermine All button.
  5. The error message is not displayed anymore.
  6. Click on the Save and Close button.

The Over-the-Counter Sales document is consistent and in Status To Be Invoiced. The Invoice button is enabled again.


I hope this helps.


Regards,
Harshal

entry.title: Re: 0CFI_INIT_POSITIONS ODP Not able to Enable
entry.content: Hi Sirishag;

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Bydesign Data Source
entry.content:
Hello Murli,

 

Check the data source : BTMAPPV01

Note : The data source Approval Task Details must always be used as a joined data source along with application created data source. Application created data source should act as an anchor data source. Approval Task Details data source should never be consumed independently

See : 2599498 - Errors in Approval Task Details Data Source

Regards,
Harshal

entry.title: Re: No confirmation dialog appeared after what's new 2411...
entry.content:
Hello

when accessing approvals via Managing My Area > Approvals and clicking on 'Reject,' a new pop-up screen appears, prompting the user to confirm the rejection.

 

However, this same functionality is not applied when rejecting tasks through the My Launchpad work center. From the My Launchpad view, clicking 'Reject' results in the task being immediately rejected without the confirmation pop-up, bypassing the new functionality. SAP is aware about this problem and they are working to provide a new correction to fix this scenario.


Regards,
Harshal

entry.title: Re: The behavior of "DATA()=0" for booked and unbooked data
entry.content:

Enoch

entry.title: Re: Cannot publish product - no link to API Business Hub...
entry.content:
Hi, I had the same problem. Everything seemed to be done correctly, all policies added, API Portal and Developer Hub in API Management ( Capabilities ) in green as active, I even deployed API but there was no access to Developer Hub.

Unfortunately, the solution was to deactivate API Management ( Capabilities ), relogin and reactivate API Management ( Capabilities ), we lose the previously created API etc. but it worked for me.

entry.title: Re: writing in same table without locking it
entry.content:
As to your sample:

It shows the typical deadlock problem of trying to acquire the same resources in different (or here random) order (as there is no defined order in the cursor), and it also misses access on the underlying table before the update itself.

Here's a slightly enhanced procedure that joins the sa_split_list-results with the MyInventary table, returns the rows in a declared order (so in the same order for each transaction) and uses FOR UPDATE to make the server place an "intent lock" on each row. In a separate connection, you can use "call sa_locks()" to notice how the rows are locked before the updates are tried, and there shopuld be no dead lock. (Of course both sample miss error handling in case the quantity would get negative.)

It basically forces a transaction to get its own resources in the same order, and no transaction can "overtake" another one, so basically they are serialized if they try to access the same products.

 

create or replace procedure ReceiveSinglePiecesShipping(ProductList long varchar)
begin
for ShippedProducts as mycursor cursor for
   select MI.ProductName as MyProductName, Quantity
   from sa_split_list(ProductList) SPL inner join MyInventary MI on trim(SPL.row_value) = MI.ProductName
   order by MI.ProductName
   for update
do
   waitfor delay ('00:00:02');
   update MyInventary set Quantity = Quantity - 1 where ProductName = MyProductName;
   end for;
end;

entry.title: Re: writing in same table without locking it
entry.content: Just to add: There are many aspects to locking, isolation levels, cursor types, and I certainly do not claim to know too much of all that...

entry.title: Re: 0CFI_INIT_POSITIONS ODP Not able to Enable
entry.content:
Hi Sirishag;

I would like to better understand how exactly you use 0CFM_INIT_POSITIONS datasource.
In our case, we use it to update BWFS_CFM_SELEC_V table. The execution of the datasource creates an entry in this table, initializing the combination of CC+VA. This initialization enables the use of the second datasource 0CFM_DELTA_POSITIONS.

We are able to use 0CFM_INIT_POSITIONS under ODP context, connecting BW4HANA to S4HANA.
Therefore, I do not understand the usage of CDSs in this particular case.

Thank you very much,
BR

entry.title: Re: 0CFI_INIT_POSITIONS ODP Not able to Enable
entry.content: *Sorry, I meant 'we use it to update BWFS_CFM_SELEC table'.

entry.title: S4 HANA Migration from ECC, Message no. FINS_ACDOC_POST065
entry.content:
Dear All,
I need urgent support from the group.

We are facing an issue, post migrating our ECC system to S/4 HANA, while processing post with clearing/payments (manual or automatic) for various open items that were posted prior to S4 HANA migration, we are getting an error as, “Referenced journal entry xxxx/xxxxxxxxxx/xxxx (company code/document no./year) does not contain currency type 30” (Message no. FINS_ACDOC_POST065), and thus the clearing is not getting posted.

This error is not occurring for the line items that are posted after the migration and hence they are getting cleared.

entry.title: Re: changeset processing in sap cap
entry.content: Hi @syedimran, but your request is a batch request. CAP handle every request in batch as a single request. Your action is called mutiple times.

But at BTE is not showing this BTE structures ( but info is already there, at screen), specifically EBELN and EBELP data ( but with EBELN I would be already happy). Thanks!

Hi Community,

I wanted to understand types of service instances created in SAP BTP after CAP app deployment, which are must required and which can be deleted.

entry.title: Re: Enterprise Architecture for integration?
entry.content:
Stevang,

great discussion.

Integrations are a fine art, Integration Architecture is one of the most important domains of the Digital Transformation, because in my experience on the technical side in the Digital Transformation a lot of what we are doing is connecting and integrating Business Applications to enable End to End Business Processes.

To put my thoughts simply, in my experience, as we make the (User Experience) Front-End simpler the Back-End complexity becomes higher.

I blogged this today in the Community:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/cio-guide-solutions-to-the-growing-hidden-cost-of-simplification-in-the/ba-p/13943041

I've written the Integrations Patterns Standards at two Customers and it is such an important subject to ensure consistency and speed in this complex area.

Andy.

entry.title: Re: changeset processing in sap cap

entry.content:
Hi

You can se the APIs

https://api.sap.com/package/authtrustmgmnt/rest

Specifically https://api.sap.com/api/PlatformAPI/overview

if you want to get information from Microsoft EntraID you can use the Graph API

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Assignment profile stopped executing after I removed...
entry.content:
@Connie3 Hi! Just wanted to tap in becuase I wanted to ensure I clarified what others have said. Yes, once you make 'any' changes to the AP and save it - the AP 'freezes' unless you execute it again. 

I found this text in some help documentation that aids in explaining it:

  • Assignment profiles create groups of users. For example, administrators can make an assignment profile that includes all users in a particular city. The system looks for the CITY attribute of the USER object and assigns all matching USERs to the new assignment profile (a group of users in the same city). When administrators add or change an assignment profile, they must propagate it, meaning that the system runs through all user records to find users in a matching city to put in the new assignment profile.
  • Propagation and synchronization are two different processes. Any time an assignment profile is created or changed, it must be propagated through a background job before it can be synchronized through the automatic process. Assignment profiles that are not propagated are skipped during the assignment profile synchronization process.

So essentially, the system thinks you are still 'working on it' and that the pool of employees selected by the AP will change - therefore it doesnt want to make any changes to that pool (adding or removing users) until the pool has been finalized and re-executed.

Even though you went back to the original AP rules and resaved, the system doesnt recognize that. It knows you changed something and you saved it, so it needs to be re-executed. I hope this helps to clarify!

entry.title: Sales Order Stock Transfer(whole Storage Bin)from one SLoc to another within Plant of same Warehouse
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Greetings for the day!

Our requirement is to Transfer Sales Order Stock (whole Storage Bin) from one SLoc to another within Plant of same Warehouse. We have used combination of T-code: HUMO and LT06. But we need to update WM and IM modules simultaneously, for that we want to use LQ02 or LQ01. 

Kindly share config. steps needed for the same. If there's any other T-code available for our requirement kindly let us know.

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Annual Sales List - Belgium
entry.content:
Hi all, 

I have a question about the Annual Sales List for Belgium. 

On the SAP Help Page: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/fba518519f834ed99011786d831ee504/f5bdf2577840bd12e10000000a4450e5.html I am a bit confused about the content of the Annual Sales List.

Normally, the Annual Sales List only includes Business Partners with a Belgian Tax Number and only if the Sales Amount without Tax is more than €250. Although, if the total sales amount is negative because there are more CN's than invoices, that Business Partner is still included in the report. Is this correct?

In my opinion, if there are more CN's than invoices the Sales Amount is negative so less than €250. Does this make sense? 

Thank you for sharing your thoughts.

Kind regards,

Vanessa Callens

entry.title: Re: How can I hide specific enums in Smartedit
entry.content:
Hello,

To achieve data level hiding you can use the restriction on your smart edit user's user group level which do not allow those specific enums to be returned to that user. You can write a query which is applicable on your enum table and exclude the values which you do not want.

entry.title: Is Implicit Enhancement Permitted in SAP Certified Products?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I would like to clarify whether implicit enhancements are allowed in SAP certified products. In the context of customizing or extending standard SAP functionality, I've heard that implicit enhancements might not be permitted for certified products.

I understand that SAP recommends using enhancement points, BAdIs, user exits, and other supported customization tools. However, I am not clear on the specific stance regarding implicit enhancements when it comes to products that are certified by SAP.

Can anyone share insights or official guidelines about the use of implicit enhancements in SAP certified solutions? Are there any restrictions or best practices I should be aware of regarding this?

Looking forward to your feedback!

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Salesforce to SAP CPI(Rojo) Integration
entry.content: Hi there! Your approach seems solid, especially for working with multiple s-objects. Running individual queries for each s-object, such as Work Order, Asset, and Return Order, and merging them using the gather function is a practical method. This allows precise mapping to the S4 EDMX file before sending the data via API to S4. For SAP Salesforce integration, you might also consider composite queries if relationships exist among the Salesforce data. This can help reduce the number of API calls and make the integration more efficient. Let me know if you'd like further insights—I’m happy to assist!

entry.title: Re: How to upload, download and delete attachments in the Object Store using SAP Build Apps?
entry.content: Hi @vikas_992001 , Unfortunately, I am not an expert of Document management service, so I would not be able to comment here.

entry.title: Implicit enhancement is permitted in SAP certified product or not?.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Can anyone clarify if implicit enhancements are allowed in SAP-certified products? I understand that SAP prefers using enhancement points, BAdIs, and user exits, but I'm unsure about the rules regarding implicit enhancements in certified solutions.

Are there any official guidelines or best practices on this topic?

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Re: How to upload, download and delete attachments in the Object Store using SAP Build Apps?
entry.content: Hi @Yuka_Iehara, Unfortunately this is not a possible use case.

entry.title: Re: My SAP Certification on Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content: Thank you so much dear @Anne_Lenhardt

entry.title: Multiple Equipment in one Work Order for Planned Maintenance
entry.content:
Limit the number of Work Orders for Planned Maintenance, while still covering detailed proof of inspection, precise document assignment and cost allocation.

 

Context

Conflicting objectives: Settlement rules according to SAP standard vs. efficient work order processing
SAP standard: one maintenance plan for many equipment has correspondingly many maintenance items; each maintenance item generates a work order with one equipment as reference object; apart from that, all these many work orders have the same content; the settlement rule of each work order is created with the account assignment of the reference object - this is not satisfactory

Alternative that could be programmed: Put all equipment on the object list of one maintenance item; generate thus only one work order with an invalid reference object but all equipment on the object list; generate the settlement rule distributed equally across the account assignment of each equipment on the object list.

Could anyone suggest a Standard process for this request? Thanks!

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP EAM Work Order

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content: @PetraRana : yes, is provided.

entry.title: Re: Externalized Parameters are not displayed in the configuration view
entry.content: Was parameter 'Test1' created, but is potentially no longer referenced in the flow you are describing?

entry.title: Re: Firebase and last 4.12.107 Runtime Issues
entry.content: We have fixed a related issue, but if this still happens with Client Runtime Version 4.12.127 or newer please let us know!

entry.title: Re: changeset processing in sap cap
entry.content: @syedimran That's exactly what this request addresses. Different batch handling

entry.title: Re: Multiple Equipment in one Work Order for Planned Main...
entry.content: Additional Info: For e.g. when a Planned Maintenance Activity is planned for 200 valves in a Functional Location, only one Work Order should be generated for inspecting all those 200 Objects and similarly one Purchase Request should be created for all the 200 valves, where the costs for inspection should be equally allocated.

entry.title: Re: BSEG-EBELN and EBELP not populated at BTE 1120 structure
entry.content:
Are the fields displayed on screen part of RSEG (invoice item) structure/table and not always copied to BSEG (Fi document item) - check with F1 and technical info icon

  • In this case, check that the invoice number and item number are filled in BSEG, so you could check in Abap Stack for the PO numbers associated with those Invoice numbers. For test, put a break-point at start of OPEN_FI_PERFORM_00001120_P or your own FM
  • In case the invoice is not avalialbe in the stack (e.g. BTE in update task or other LUW or local data) consider saving this information in some MIRO BAdI

entry.content: Dear All. please help.

Thanks

Sakthivel

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation – SMTP Mail Destination using Microsoft 365 email provider
entry.content:
HI @KarthikeyanMurthy. the blog is very informative.

i want to use smtp mail server (Azure outlook 365) same has you mention, i configured everything what you said in blog, but once i try to test connection its showing me  An unexpected error has occurred due to missing SMTP configuration

when i login to mailbox through outlook i can able to login and send/receive mails, but via SAP BTP Business Process Automation not able test connection 

please help me with this

entry.title: ABAP News for SAP BTP ABAP Environment 2411
entry.content:
In this blog, you'll learn about the new features for SAP BTP ABAP Environment 2411.

News for ABAP Release 9.13

ABAP CDS

Client Safety of CDS Table Functions

CDS table functions can be declared explicitly client-safe using the annotation ClientHandling.clientSafe.

  • More about client safety of CDS table functions
  • Blog about client safety of CDS table functions

Internal Tables

READ TABLE ... WHERE ...

The READ TABLE statement now supports the WHERE addition. If the WHERE condition is fulfilled, the first line of the internal table is read. You can use the following syntax:

LOOP AT itab … WHERE log_exp|(cond_syntax).

More about the WHERE addition in READ TABLE

IS [NOT] INITIAL in WHERE Condition of FILTER

You can now use IS INITIAL or IS NOT INITIAL in the WHERE condition of FILTER.

More about IS [NOT] INITIAL in WHERE condition of FILTER

ABAP SQL

Binary Floating Point Types in Arithmetic Expressions

In ABAP SQL arithmetic expressions, you can now use operands of type FLTP or f in decimal floating point expressions. Integer types can be used in binary floating point expressions.

More about binary floating point types in arithmetic expressions

Transformations

Regular Expressions for XSLT

XSL Transformations now support the regular expression functions matches(), replace(), and tokenize().

  • More about regular expressions for XSLT
  • Blog about regular expressions for XSLT

ABAP Keyword Documentation

The first step has been taken, and starting with this release, we will publish the ABAP Keyword Documentation content with the ADT design. With the ADT design, the documentation looks better, but the feeling remains the same. Sections in the documentation are now even more visible with different recurring design patterns. In addition, the new version improves the search with a type-ahead functionality and a better way to send links (you can copy the URL). In future releases, the ADT design will replace the UI5 design.

  • More about the ADT design

If you have any questions, feel free to comment below. We hope you enjoy the new features.

entry.title: Restrict Business Users from Deleting Contacts because of multiple Marketing Area
entry.content:
We have the following Problem: User can delete contacts in the contacts app which share more than one Marketing Area!

Background: 
Contacts are assigned to multiple Marketing Areas with several Subscriptions. Different User Roles have access to different Marketing Areas eg:

  • Business Unit A - Marketing Area A
  • Business Unit B - Marketing Area B 
  • etc.

If a User from Business Unit A now deletes a contact which also has Marketing Area B, C and D, the contact with all its subscriptions / interactions is being deleted for all Marketing Areas.  

My goal is that all business roles have access to Write, Read Access to "Import, Change Values for Custom fields, Create Target Groups etc" but I do not want that users are able to delete contacts, as this has an impact on other business units as well, as contacts have multiple subscriptions etc.

- We have tried to restrict the Write, Read access which then causes issues that Users can purely see but not import / update contacts anymore via contacts app anymore

- I have also tried to check a different layout, but I cant remove the "Delete Button" from the Layout. 

 

Does someone has a clue or idea on I can restrict users from being able to delete contacts via the contacts app but still be able to import change data or create contacts? Any help is highly appreciated. 

BR
Sascha

entry.title: Re: changeset processing in sap cap
entry.content: Hi @akuller_q Thank you please check https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-cap-unbound-action-with-conditions-as-input/qaq-p/13943291 and https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/apply-selected-value-as-a-filter-after-action-is-performed-in-cap/qaq-p/13943236 when you have time

entry.title: Re: changeset processing in sap cap
entry.content: we

entry.title: Re: IBP Excel Add in Editable Key Figure greyed out
entry.content:
The formatting of the Key Figure in IBP Excel is solely managed in the IBP Formatting Sheet.

If your previous setting for "Default Format for Editable Cells" was set to grey, then they will be displayed as grey. You just need to make sure that the setting is correct and the "Apply" tickbox is selected.

entry.title: Re: BSEG-EBELN and EBELP not populated at BTE 1120 structure
entry.content: BSEG-REBZG, REBZJ, REBZZ to link to RSEG

entry.title: Re: Assignment profile stopped executing after I removed...
entry.content: Hi Alex, thank you for commenting on my request. I do have two follow up questions:

entry.title: Re: 🟣 Set Up Rules for Who Can Create and Transport SAP Build Projects
entry.content:
You can also transport Workzone content with cTMS (see documentation). This would be a separate transport landscape (potentially with Dev / Test / Prod tenants as well). If I understand the dependencies correctly you first have to transport / import / activate (?) the Build Apps content in the respective target environment (Test / Prod), followed by the corresponding transport of the Workzone content (so that it finds the referenced Apps already in place).
However, it is as of now not possible to model these kind of (mixed content) dependencies in cTMS, so that would be a manual process. This is made more difficult by the fact that Workzone provides very limited (not to say none...) information on the content of the transport request. You would therefore have to pick the correct Workzone transport by release date 🙄

entry.title: sap core data services
entry.content:
Hello everyone, first of all I don't know if it is correct to ask this question in this section so please tell me if I am wrong.
the reason of this post is to ask you about some learning path about sap core data services together with fiori elements applications.
I have found a lot of information but not for beginners in the subject, so I would appreciate if someone with more knowledge can tell me where it would be practical to learn.
thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: Assignment profile stopped executing after I removed...
entry.content: Thank you for your help with this question. I have a couple of follow up questions: 1) Does the AP stop executing/ pauses completely if we only save a change and do not propagate/"Execute Changes" or does it continue to execute without the saved changes? And 2) After we save and propagate or execute changes, so we also have to click "Update Users and Assignments" or is "Execute Changes" enough? Thank you!

entry.title: Re: upload Internal table data to application server in .xls
entry.content: Can you please share an code example to write the binary table to application server

entry.title: HCM Adoption Mission- "SuccessFactors Latest Goals Universal Push Customer Enablement Session"(AMER)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the option "Yes" to "Will you be attending?" will NOT register you for the event. To register for the event, please REGISTER HERE in order to receive the event invite and login details. 

“SuccessFactors Latest Goals Universal Push Customer Enablement Session” Global Series

The migration from the legacy version of Goal Management to the latest version is approaching. This process will occur in two phases: the initial migration is scheduled for 29th March 2025, and the subsequent one on 27th December, 2025. We invite you to attend our informative sessions to learn about the migration criteria, receive essential notes for cycle planning, explore additional feature plans, and understand the legacy feature deprecation schedule. We encourage you to come prepared with any questions you may have.

For more information on the rest of the series, visit the SAP Community Blog.

 

AMER – Tuesday 25th February 2025
1:00 pm EST Eastern Time
REGISTRATION

 

If you have any questions, please get in touch with the VIP Program Managers: 

vanesa.medricka@sap.com and samanta.ferreri@sap.com

entry.title: Re: BusinessObject DEV CMS DB deleted .How to refresh it...
entry.content: Ok, so that's the same error you got before. It's a generic message and can have many possible causes. Check the CMS logs next. You may need to increase the logging level.
